summary: Reference context is complete and accurate. All key areas covered:
notes: All key areas covered: builtins.md (mb_compile implementation), value-and-rc.md (new CodeObject ObjData variant), source-and-diagnostics.md (SourceFile/SourceMap for parse error line/col resolution), exception.md (raising SyntaxError), symbols.md (symbol registration). Spec plan is clean: two modify actions on existing spec files, subfolder paths are correct, sections are appropriate. No irrelevant specs included. The parser/ast.md spec could be added as low-relevance background context since CodeObject stores a parsed Module, but the current set is sufficient as the parser API is stable and well-understood.
